nrf_sql._comment: Windows Trusted Connection only. No SQL logins. Must be on NRF network/VPN.

ai._comment: API key is NOT stored here. It lives in Windows Credential Manager via keyring. Set it on the Settings page.

ocr._comment: If a PDF page yields fewer than threshold chars of embedded text, fall back to OCR.

fuzzy._comment: Scores >= auto_accept are auto-confirmed. Between floor and auto require user review. Below floor are flagged unmatched.
